title: Platform settings
description: Global SaaS settings that apply to every clinic.

intro.title: In-app assistant control
intro.body: Set the daily message limit for clinics and manage the announcements they see on login. As superadmin you have no limit and can use the assistant in this portal.

assistant.title: In-app AI assistant
assistant.description: Daily message cap per clinic user (help + read-only lookups). Superadmin is unlimited.

announcement.title: Clinic announcements
announcement.description: Records for the modal tenants see on entry. Only one can be live at a time.

fields.daily_limit_hint: Between 1 and 1000. Resets at midnight (app timezone). Recommended default: 40. Does not apply to superadmin.

announcements.empty: No announcements yet. Create the first one with New announcement.

form.description: This content is shown in the clinic modal until users tap Got it.

fields.title: Title
fields.features_hint: Optional. If empty, the modal uses the assistant default highlights.
fields.publish_now_hint: When enabled, this announcement replaces the live one and is shown to clinics.

footer.never_updated: No global configuration has been saved yet.
